name: PhonePe
description: India's most-used UPI payments app with 500M+ users for money transfers, bill payments, investments, and insurance
pros: Most popular UPI app with 48%+ market share in India
Clean, fast UI for payments, recharges, and bill payments
PhonePe Pulse provides UPI transaction data insights
Expanding into insurance, mutual funds, and lending
cons: Walmart (US) owns 72% — India's largest UPI app is foreign-controlled
Data sovereignty concerns with Walmart as parent company
Investment products have limited selection compared to dedicated platforms
Cashback offers reduced significantly from early days
userComplaints: Transaction failures during peak UPI hours with money debited but not credited
Customer support response time is very slow for failed transactions
Keeps pushing insurance and loan products aggressively in the app
